name: Bath Towel
hint: A large towel used for drying the body after a bath or shower.

name: Toothbrush
hint: A tool used for brushing teeth to maintain oral hygiene.

name: Shampoo
hint: A liquid or gel used for cleaning and conditioning hair.

name: Soap Dispenser
hint: A container for dispensing liquid soap for handwashing.

name: Shower Curtain
hint: A curtain that hangs in the shower area to prevent water splashing.

name: Toilet Paper
hint: A paper product used for personal hygiene after using the toilet.

name: Razor
hint: A tool for shaving facial or body hair.

name: Bathroom Mat
hint: A mat placed on the bathroom floor to absorb water and prevent slipping.

name: Faucet
hint: A device for controlling the flow of water in sinks and showers.

name: Towel Rack
hint: A fixture for hanging towels to keep them dry and organized.

name: Mirror
hint: A reflective surface used for personal grooming and checking appearance.

name: Hair Dryer
hint: An electrical appliance for drying hair quickly.

name: Toilet Brush
hint: A brush used for cleaning the inside of a toilet bowl.

name: Cotton Swabs
hint: Small sticks with cotton tips used for various personal care tasks.

name: Shower Head
hint: A device that sprays water for showering.

name: Tissue Box
hint: A box containing tissues for use in the bathroom.

name: Sink
hint: A basin used for washing hands and face.

name: Mouthwash
hint: A liquid used for rinsing and freshening the mouth.

name: Toilet Seat
hint: The hinged seat on a toilet bowl for sitting.

name: Cabinet
hint: A storage unit for toiletries and bathroom supplies.

name: Towel Hook
hint: A hook for hanging towels and robes in the bathroom.

name: Bath Sponge
hint: A soft sponge used for applying soap and washing the body.

name: Plunger
hint: A tool used for unclogging toilets and drains.

name: Hand Sanitizer
hint: A gel or liquid used for hand disinfection.

name: Tumbler
hint: A small cup used for rinsing the mouth or holding toothbrushes.

name: Bathrobe
hint: A comfortable garment worn after bathing.

name: Scale
hint: A device for measuring body weight.

name: Shower Caddy
hint: A container used to organize shower and bath products.

name: Candles
hint: Small candles used for adding ambiance in the bathroom.

name: Towel Ring
hint: A ring-shaped fixture for hanging hand towels.

name: Electric Toothbrush
hint: An automated toothbrush for efficient teeth cleaning.

name: Tissue Dispenser
hint: A container for easy dispensing of tissues.

name: Hairbrush
hint: A tool for brushing and styling hair.

name: Towel Warmer
hint: A device for heating and warming towels for a luxurious feel.

name: Toilet Paper Holder
hint: A fixture for holding and dispensing rolls of toilet paper.

name: Shower Radio
hint: A waterproof radio for entertainment while showering.

name: Bath Mat
hint: A non-slip mat placed in the bathtub or shower for safety.

name: Towel Stand
hint: A freestanding rack for holding and displaying towels.

name: Cotton Balls
hint: Soft balls of cotton used for various cosmetic and hygiene purposes.
